--- a/explore2.py

@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+import os, sys

+sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')

+

+from tsr.utils import get_spherical_cameras

+

+# Also check the renderer

+from tsr.system import TSR

+import inspect

+src = inspect.getsource(TSR.render)

+print('\nFull TSR.render source:')

+print(src)

+

+# Check renderer class

+from tsr.bake_texture import BakeTexture

+import inspect

+print('\nTSR module files:')

+print(dir(tsr))

+print('tsr path:', tsr.__path__)
